On top of that, they added unwanted extra charges on room service without giving any clear explanation. This felt unprofessional and unfair.
Overall, the hotel failed in both comfort and service. I would not recommend staying here until they resolve these issues. 1200 is best  for this hotel...2250 not worth it","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Ajay Yadav","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWf9KeUeajRhhencqxzz3mf_1VWbe2n-1kI9osfqo00uXNanP5p=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"My recent stay at Hotel Bill Berry in Rewari was an experience that offered a mix of highs and lows. The hotel is often cited as a good option for travelers, and its reputation for a central location and spacious rooms is well-founded. However, a deeper dive into the guest experience reveals some areas where the hotel shines and others that could benefit from significant improvement.
​First and foremost, the location of Hotel Bill Berry is a major advantage. Situated near key landmarks like the railway station and BMG Mall, it's incredibly convenient for those traveling for business or leisure. The ease of access to transportation and shopping areas makes it a practical choice for anyone looking to navigate the city without hassle. This is a point that is consistently praised in guest reviews and was a highlight of my own stay.
​The rooms themselves are generally spacious and well-maintained. The hotel seems to have made an effort to provide comfortable and clean accommodations. This is a crucial aspect of any hotel stay, and for the most part, Hotel Bill Berry delivers. However, there are some inconsistencies that can be a drawback. While some guests have reported spotless rooms, others have noted issues with cleanliness, mentioning things like stains on bedding and poorly functioning amenities like the air conditioning or television. My experience fell somewhere in the middle, with a clean but somewhat dated room.
​Food and service at the hotel present a similar duality. The hotel's multi-cuisine restaurant is a significant selling point, with many guests praising the quality and taste of the food. The vegetarian restaurant, in particular, has received positive feedback for its authentic Indian delicacies. On the other hand, the service can be a bit of a mixed bag. While some staff members are reported to be cooperative and polite, others have been described as unhelpful, leading to slow response times for things like room service. This inconsistency in service is a key area for improvement.
​One area of concern that came up in my research, and is worth noting, is security. A few reviews have highlighted a lack of privacy and security, with some guests reporting incidents that are quite alarming. While this may not be a widespread issue, it's a concern that the management should address to ensure the safety and peace of mind of all guests.
​In conclusion, Hotel Bill Berry in Rewari is a budget-friendly option that offers a decent stay, especially for those who prioritize location and spacious rooms. The food is a definite plus, and the cooperative staff can make for a pleasant experience. However, the hotel's reputation is hampered by inconsistencies in cleanliness, service, and, in some cases, security. While it can be a good choice for a short, convenient stay, travelers with high expectations for amenities and service consistency might want to explore other options.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhC8x7sHYsoFABYrFAooJUNX&fid=0x0:0x28c827b1e0ea4f4f"],"When":"2025-8-28"},{"Name":"Megha Goel","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKKA9w_0DHWbXLkNjnZ7J8CR-ZS8Zzmx4niMUxLnxudoVtfsw=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"There was some personal party going onn in hotel.....too much noisy till 2am at night.......services super poor","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Nipun Rajguru","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUhRMe9I3eD4iiR6ldupsYTRRWJA4qZyKFuUOPGEWNLZboSmV_NXg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Service and room cleaning was good. In my opinion you will not regret if you stay over here 😄 .","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Subrahmanyam B H V S P","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjV0nM8pd2rCKIPjeReaD_57LW5V0CvySYDepgrhi-oLABCDT6UA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"5-Star Experience in Rewari.

The hotel is very affordable, the rooms are spacious, well-furnished and very well maintained. Hotel Overview

BMG Mall is a local shopping site, located 3 km away. Guests are offered accommodation in 21 centrally air-conditioned and spacious rooms. Some of the in-room amenities offered are LCD television, mini-bar, and attached bathroom with hot and cold water facility. Additionally, conveniences such as concierge assistance, laundry/dry-cleaning, room service and currency exchange are also provided. Places of interest include Dharuhera Chungi (2 km), Rao Tula Ram Park (4 km) and Jyohad Lake (5 km).
